nasb.text: But God split the hollow place that is in Lehi so that water came out of it. When he drank, his strength returned and he revived. Therefore he named it En-hakkore, which is in Lehi to this day.

esv.text: And God split open the hollow place that is at Lehi, and water came out from it. And when he drank, his spirit returned, and he revived. Therefore the name of it was called En-hakkore; it is at Lehi to this day.

cnv.text: 於是　神在利希使一窪地裂開，就有水從那裡湧出來；參孫喝了，就恢復精神，活力充足；因此那泉名叫隱．哈歌利，那泉直到今日還在利希。

ccb.text: 于是，上帝使利希的一处洼地裂开，涌出水来。参孙喝后恢复了精神。因此，那水泉叫隐哈·歌利。那水泉今天还在利希。
